x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: CSM case categories are the primary classification signal for Now Assist routing and similar case matching.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Standardize CSM categories and enforce selection via UI policy at case creation. Target: 85%+ of closed cases categorized. Now Assist CSM uses category for AI routing and similar case recommendations.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_47f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c9e
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[CSM case categories are the primary classification signal for Now Assist routing and similar case matching.]]></ai_justification><check_name>CSM Case Categorization Quality</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sn_customerservice_case');
    gaTotal.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,6');
    gaTotal.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No closed CSM cases in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No closed CSM cases found in the last 12 months. Case categorization quality cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaCat = new GlideAggregate('sn_customerservice_case');
    gaCat.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,6');
    gaCat.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaCat.addQuery('category', '!=', '');
    gaCat.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaCat.query();
    var categorized = gaCat.next() ? parseInt(gaCat.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((categorized / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of closed CSM cases categorized (last 12 months, ' + categorized + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 85) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of closed CSM cases have a category. Now Assist CSM has strong classification signal for AI routing and similar case matching.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 60) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of closed CSM cases are categorized (target: 85%). Now Assist CSM AI routing and similar case matching will have reduced accuracy.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of CSM cases are categorized. Insufficient classification signal — Now Assist CSM AI routing requires consistent category data.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>CSM</module><number>CHK0000421</number><order>90</order><remediation_guidance>Standardize CSM categories and enforce selection via UI policy at case creation. Target: 85%+ of closed cases categorized. Now Assist CSM uses category for AI routing and similar case recommendations.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>47f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c9e</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>CSM Case Categorization Quality</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_47f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c9e</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
